creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 229350
Verbose boot log

There are 6 physical ports but FreeBSD lists 32

Hardware:
SilverStone ECS06 6-port SATA branded card (v1.1) utilizing ASMedia's ASM1166 controller
https://www.silverstonetek.com/product.php?pid=973&area=en
RockPro64 (arm64 SBC)

root@generic:/home/freebsd # pciconf -lbcevV pci0:1:0:0
ahci0@pci0:1:0:0:       class=0x010601 rev=0x02 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x1b21 device=0x1166 subvendor=0x2116 subdevice=0x2116
    vendor     = 'ASMedia Technology Inc.'
    class      = mass storage
    subclass   = SATA
    bar   [10] = type Memory, range 32, base 0, size 8192, enabled
    bar   [24] = type Memory, range 32, base 0xfa000000, size 8192, enabled
    cap 01[40] = powerspec 3  supports D0 D3  current D0
    cap 05[50] = MSI supports 1 message, 64 bit enabled with 1 message
    cap 10[80] = PCI-Express 2 endpoint max data 128(512) RO NS
                 max read 512
                 link x2(x2) speed 2.5(8.0) ASPM disabled(L0s/L1) ClockPM disabled
    ecap 0001[100] = AER 1 0 fatal 0 non-fatal 0 corrected
    ecap 0019[130] = PCIe Sec 1 lane errors 0

Software:
FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #0 stable/13-n247742-e058d44fda3: Thu Oct 21 04:04:50 UTC 2021

I did find at least someone else running into this issue with another card but information is a bit sparse.
https://xpenology.com/forum/topic/35882-new-sataahci-cards-with-more-then-4-ports-and-no-sata-multiplexer/?tab=comments#comment-177633

Verbose bootlog is attched

Let me know if you need anything else
